allow: Bash(sqlite3 ~/.prompt-trail/db.sqlite "SELECT id, tool_name, status FROM prompt_responses ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.prompt-trail/db.sqlite "SELECT id, prompt_text, prompt_category, accepted, files_changed, lines_added, lines_removed FROM prompt_entries ORDER BY id")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.prompt-trail/db.sqlite "SELECT id, claude_response FROM prompt_entries WHERE id IN \(2,3,4\)")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.prompt-trail/db.sqlite "SELECT id, diff FROM prompt_entries WHERE id = 4")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.prompt-trail/db.sqlite "SELECT id, prompt_text, claude_response FROM prompt_entries WHERE claude_response != '' OR prompt_text LIKE '%comment 2%' OR prompt_text LIKE '%tracking%' ORDER BY id")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.prompt-trail/db.sqlite "SELECT id, prompt_text, prompt_category, accepted, files_changed, lines_added, lines_removed, claude_response != '' as has_response FROM prompt_entries ORDER BY id")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.prompt-trail/db.sqlite "SELECT id, prompt_entry_id, tool_name, status, tool_output IS NOT NULL as has_output FROM prompt_responses ORDER BY id")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.prompt-trail/db.sqlite "SELECT claude_response FROM prompt_entries WHERE id = 1")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.prompt-trail/db.sqlite "SELECT tool_name, tool_output FROM prompt_responses WHERE tool_name = 'AskUserQuestion'")
